title: Chrome Issue - Monday goes blank
excerpt: Hello! I’ve been noticing recently that portions of or the entire main pane in Monday.com goes blank randomly when using Chrome (My Chrome is up to date, btw). The sidebar and top nav bar remain visible, but boards, docs…

posts.author: ericmoss (Eric Moss)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I’ve been noticing recently that portions of or the entire main pane in Monday.com goes blank randomly when using Chrome (My Chrome is up to date, btw). The sidebar and top nav bar remain visible, but boards, docs, etc. will go blank for no reason at all. Has anyone experienced this and found a resolution to this issue? Thanks in advance!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Eric! This sounds very odd! Have you tried clearing the cache or opening your account in an incognito window? Let me know if this helps! If not, we’d recommend troubleshooting this with our technical support engineers. You can reach out here.
